title: Assignment Polling Contract
summary: This is the public generated reader for the C10 assignment polling contract shared by riido-daemon and riido-control-plane.
responsibilities: `assignment` owns the shared `riido-ai-server.v1` DTO contract, assignment states, legal transitions, poll actions, task events, approval values, execution identity, payload snapshot fields, and runtime binding DTOs.
Markdown readers must link to `assignment/assignment_contract.riido.json` instead of redefining the matrix by hand.
The contract fixture is decoded as one strict JSON document; unknown fields and trailing JSON are failures.
boundaries: This package does not own control-plane store actors, HTTP handlers, SSE fan-out, request authorization, provider process execution, Terraform, DynamoDB/EventBridge adapters, AWS account settings, secret values, or deployment evidence.
`Health` and `MetricsSnapshot` remain in `riido-control-plane` until they are promoted from adapter/read-model contracts.

Private repositories remain private/unsupported until a future token-reference broker exists; raw tokens, signed URLs, and credentialed clone URLs must not enter assignment payloads, prompts, events, logs, RAG context, or daemon clone arguments.
invariants: `Assignment.allow_experimental_runtime` is assignment-created snapshot data derived by control-plane and consumed by daemon; daemon must not infer it from provider name or local environment.

`Assignment.model_id` is assignment-created snapshot data for runtime model selection; daemon must not re-resolve model defaults from provider name, environment, team id, or Open API key configuration.
While an assignment is `leased`, `ready`, or `running`, the daemon sends an assignment heartbeat every 5 seconds.
The control plane treats the active assignment lease as stale when it has not been refreshed for 20 seconds, and late heartbeats/events must not revive it.
`PollRequest.wait_ms` is an optional long-poll hint. Omitted or zero preserves the legacy short-poll wire shape.
`PollResponse.action=active` must include a self-contained assignment snapshot so a restarted daemon can recover local in-flight state without starting fresh.
handoff: `riido-control-plane` should import tagged assignment constants/DTOs instead of duplicating them.
`riido-daemon` should consume the tagged contract through its SaaS adapter without importing runtime-internal control-plane packages.

loop.observation: Assignment polling had a strict executable contract and package tests, but the public reader was hand-maintained prose and the workflow did not publish JSON evidence.
loop.hypothesis: Generating the reader and evidence from the assignment contract manifest will keep state/action/payload governance aligned across daemon and control-plane while preserving dependency-map anchors.
loop.execute: Strictly decode the assignment contract, render the generated reader, check reader drift, and publish assignment-contract evidence in public CI.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails on malformed manifest, stale generated reader, missing workflow evidence binding, malformed contract JSON, unknown fields, or missing strict artifact upload.
loop.retrospective: Assignment polling governance becomes a contract-backed loop instead of prose maintained from memory.
